headline: Amphenol Drops 5% Year to Date: Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: APH faces valuation pressure and macro headwinds despite strong acquisition-driven growth, solid cash flow and rising orders supporting the outlook.

headline: TE Connectivity to report second quarter financial results on April 22, 2026
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) will report financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 before trading begins on April 22, 2026. The company will hold a conference call for investors at 8:30 a.m. ET. The conference call may be accessed in the following ways:
